name: wasm-ssh-client
description: SSHv2 client compiled to WebAssembly, for use in Cloudflare Workers and Pages Functions

scripts.build:wasm: cargo build -p wasm-ssh-bindgen --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --release && wasm-bindgen --target web --out-dir pkg --out-name ssh_wasm target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/wasm_ssh_bindgen.wasm
scripts.build: npm run build:wasm && npm run build:ts
